creator: adamk@voicenet.com
text:
In devel/sdl12/work/SDL-1.2.13/src/joystick/bsd/ there is both SDL_sysjoystick.c and SDL_sysjoystick.c.orig.  The .orig appears to be the original, non-patched version.  As a test, I copied it to SDL_sysjoystick.c and tried to compile SDL.  Unfortunately SDL won't even compile then.

I've currently gotten SDL apps to work again by setting the CONFIGURE_ARGS variable to --disable-joystick, but I'm willing to test anything.
